changelog: NEW: Settings → My HushTV Canada License — see your status (ACTIVE / EXPIRING SOON / EXPIRED), paid date, expiry date, and days remaining.
NEW: Renew Now button — adds another year on top of your current expiry (you never lose remaining days). Becomes prominent when you have less than 30 days left.
Same Interac e-Transfer payment flow for renewal — just send $40 to Hushtv.info@gmail.com with the new Order Number.
